notes:
Ember 1.8.0 — In-app Terminal, Parallel Agent Tasks & Ember Link polish

• Built-in Terminal + Python runner (Command Center → ⌨️ Terminal, or /terminal): run shell commands AND Python in-app, with a Python session that persists between runs. No more leaving Ember to use a terminal.
• Parallel Agent Tasks (Command Center → 🧠 Agent tasks, or /agents): kick off several Ember jobs at once and watch each one's live status + output in a dashboard; stop any of them. Great for running research/file tasks side by side.
• Ember Link polish: fixed the toolbar buttons whose labels (Balanced/Fast) ran off the edge; smoother mirroring on e-ink (frames decode off-screen so the picture no longer flashes black — Kindle); and on devices without the Fullscreen API (e.g. Kindle) the Fullscreen button now rotates the mirror to landscape and fills the screen — use your e-reader as a second monitor — with tap-to-click still mapped correctly.

Includes the 1.7.1 macOS shortcut fix, 1.7.0 push-to-talk voice, and 1.6.0's smarter local Ollama + chat-title picker.
